summary: Senior growth marketer at a Series B analytics startup. Data-fluent, experiment-driven, skeptical of vendor claims. Lives in spreadsheets and A/B tests.
goals: Hit 150% of MQL target this quarter
Prove content ROI to the CFO
sample_quotes: Show me the funnel numbers, not the vanity metrics.
We killed that campaign after week 2 — the CAC was insane.
